message:
perf: increase resolution limit and add 24fps ACK throttling

- Increase MAX_PIXELS from 600K to 2M (~1920x1040)
- Update adaptive JPEG quality thresholds for higher resolutions
- Add 24fps ACK throttling to control Chrome frame generation rate
- Store pending ACK in fixed buffer to handle delayed sends
- Call flushPendingAck() from main loop to ensure ACKs are sent
